notices.title: Republic Day Celebration
notices.content: All students and staff are invited to attend the Republic Day celebration on 26th January 2026 at 8:00 AM in the school auditorium. Flag hoisting will be followed by cultural performances and a march past by NCC cadets. Attendance is mandatory.

notices.title: Fee Payment Reminder — Q4 Installment
notices.content: This is a reminder that the fourth quarter fee installment is due by 31st January 2026. Parents are requested to clear all pending dues at the school office or via our online portal. Late fee of ₹500 will be applicable after the due date.

notices.title: Annual Day Rehearsal Schedule
notices.content: Rehearsals for the Annual Day function will begin from 10th February 2026. Students participating in dance, drama, and anchoring are to report to the auditorium during the 7th and 8th periods. Class teachers, kindly adjust schedules accordingly.

notices.title: Holi Vacation Announcement
notices.content: School will remain closed on 10th and 11th March 2026 on account of Holi and Dhuleti. Classes will resume on 12th March 2026 (Thursday). Wishing everyone a colourful and safe Holi!

notices.title: Staff Meeting — Academic Review
notices.content: All teaching staff are requested to attend a mandatory academic review meeting on 15th March 2026 at 3:30 PM in the conference hall. Please bring your subject-wise result analysis and attendance registers for Q3.

notices.title: Science Exhibition — Project Submission Guidelines
notices.content: Students of classes 6 to 12 are encouraged to participate in the Inter-School Science Exhibition to be held on 20-21st August 2026. Project proposals must be submitted to your respective science teachers by 1st August 2026. Teams of 2-3 students are allowed.

notices.title: Independence Day Programme
notices.content: Independence Day will be celebrated on 15th August 2026 with flag hoisting at 7:30 AM, followed by a speech competition and patriotic song performances. Students must wear full white uniform. School buses will run as per the regular schedule.

notices.title: Mid-Term Examination Schedule Released
notices.content: The mid-term examination for all classes (1 to 12) will be conducted from 21st September to 2nd October 2026. Detailed subject-wise timetable has been uploaded on the portal. Students are advised to prepare well and clear any doubts with their teachers during revision periods.

notices.title: Navratri Garba Night — Invitation
notices.content: The school is organising a Garba Night on 12th October 2026 from 7:00 PM to 10:00 PM on the school ground. Students, parents, and staff are all welcome. Entry is free. Traditional attire is encouraged. Stalls for chaat and snacks will be available.

notices.title: Diwali Vacation Notice
notices.content: School will remain closed from 28th October to 5th November 2026 for Diwali vacations. Classes will resume on 6th November 2026 (Friday). Parents are requested to ensure children complete their holiday homework during the break. शुभ दीपावली!

notices.title: Sports Day Registration — Last Date
notices.content: Registrations for Sports Day events (100m, 200m, relay, long jump, shot put, cricket, kho-kho, kabaddi) are closing on 5th December 2026. Students must register with their PT teacher. Inter-house competitions will be held on 18-19th December 2026.

notices.title: Winter Break Announcement
notices.content: School will remain closed from 26th December 2026 to 4th January 2027 for Winter Break. Classes will resume on 5th January 2027 (Monday). The school wishes all students and families a happy New Year!

notices.title: Board Exam Preparation — Special Classes
notices.content: Special doubt-clearing and revision classes for Class 10 and Class 12 board-appearing students will commence from 25th January 2027. Classes will be held from 8:00 AM to 1:00 PM, Monday to Saturday. Detailed subject schedule has been shared with class teachers.

notices.title: Parent-Teacher Meeting — July
notices.content: A Parent-Teacher Meeting for all classes will be held on 18th July 2026 (Saturday) from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM. Parents are requested to meet the class teacher and subject teachers to discuss their ward's academic progress and behaviour. Appointment slips have been sent home.

notices.title: Library Book Return — Year-End
notices.content: All students must return borrowed library books by 10th March 2027. Students with outstanding books will not receive their final report cards. Library fines of ₹5/day will be applicable for overdue books.
